page.title: AI Traffic
page.description: See visitors arriving from AI platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

empty.title: No AI visits yet
empty.description: Add a site key and embed the Quaynt attribution snippet on your site to start tracking visits from AI platforms.

kpi.ratioUnavailable: Share of total traffic is unavailable without integrating your general analytics tool.

siteKeys.title: Site Keys
siteKeys.description: Issue keys to embed in the attribution snippet. Keys are tied to your workspace and can be revoked at any time.
siteKeys.name: Name
siteKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this site key? Existing snippet installations will stop sending data.
siteKeys.plaintextWarning: This is the only time you'll see this key. Copy it now.
siteKeys.allowedOriginsHelp: Optional. When set, the snippet is accepted only from these origins.

privacy.headline: How Quaynt AI Traffic Attribution handles visitor data

gsc.title: Search Console correlation
gsc.description: GSC search performance for queries where you appear in AI Overviews.
gsc.honestyNotice: GSC does not yet expose AI Overview clicks as a separate metric. The numbers below show search performance for queries where Quaynt has detected an AI Overview citation — they include all click sources for those queries, not only AI Overviews.

chart.title: Search performance: AI-cited vs. all queries

empty.title: No GSC data yet
empty.description: Connect a Search Console property to import search performance data for your AI-cited queries.
